items.title: Mesenchymal Stem Cell-Derived Small Extracellular Vesicles in Spinal Cord Injury: From Molecular Repair Mechanisms to Standardized Translational Development.
items.authors: Arwa Omar Al Khatib; Ulugbek Akhmedov; Djaloliddin Mansurov; Rhab Mazy Jbar; K V Jamuna; Laxmidhar Maharana; Neeraj Bainsal; Divya Singhal
items.abstract: Spinal cord injury (SCI) causes permanent neurological disability through a complex sequence of primary mechanical damage and secondary injury cascades, including neuroinflammation, blood-spinal cord barrier disruption, oxidative stress, apoptotic and ferroptotic cell death, demyelination, glial scar formation, and limited axonal regeneration. Mesenchymal stem/stromal cell-derived extracellular vesicles (MSC-EVs), particularly small EV preparations frequently reported in the SCI literature as exosomes, have emerged as cell-free therapeutic candidates because they can transfer regulatory proteins, lipids, mRNAs, microRNAs, and other non-coding RNAs to injured neural, glial, immune, and vascular cells. Preclinical studies consistently report improved locomotor recovery and tissue preservation after MSC-EV treatment, with the strongest mechanistic support currently centered on immunomodulation, macrophage/microglial phenotype regulation, NF-κB/MAPK suppression, PI3K/AKT-related survival signaling, NRF2-associated antioxidant responses, and microRNA-dependent remodeling of inflammatory and regenerative networks. Additional evidence supports effects on blood-spinal cord barrier repair, angiogenesis, astrocyte reprogramming, axonal growth, remyelination, and synaptic plasticity, although many of these outcomes remain marker-driven and require stronger causal validation through cargo loss-of-function, pathway blockade, biodistribution, electrophysiology, and circuit-level assays. Bioengineering approaches, including parental-cell preconditioning, cargo enrichment, surface targeting, and hydrogel- or scaffold-assisted sustained delivery, have expanded the therapeutic potential of MSC-EVs but also increase product complexity. Human evidence remains preliminary: early intrathecal administration of allogeneic human umbilical cord MSC-derived EV preparation, reported by the investigators as exosomes, supports feasibility and short-term safety, but efficacy has not been established in adequately powered randomized trials. Using a structured narrative search strategy, explicit eligibility criteria, and a predefined evidence-mapping rule, this review synthesizes mechanistic, preclinical, delivery, and early clinical evidence and argues that translation will depend on standardized product identity, potency-linked release criteria, scalable manufacturing, dose and regimen selection informed by reported protein/particle exposure, administration route, timing, repeat dosing, and clinically meaningful trial design.

items.abstract_cn: 脊髓损伤（SCI）通过一系列复杂的原发性机械损伤和继发性损伤级联导致永久性神经功能障碍，包括神经炎症、血脊髓屏障破坏、氧化应激、细胞凋亡和铁死亡、脱髓鞘、神经胶质疤痕形成和有限的轴突再生。间充质干/基质细胞来源的细胞外囊泡（MSC-EV），特别是SCI文献中经常报道的外泌体小EV制剂，已成为无细胞治疗候选物，因为它们可以将调节蛋白、脂质、mRNA、微小RNA和其他非编码RNA转移到受损的神经细胞、神经胶质细胞、免疫细胞和血管细胞中。临床前研究一致报告 MSC-EV 治疗后运动恢复和组织保存得到改善，目前最强的机制支持集中在免疫调节、巨噬细胞/小胶质细胞表型调节、NF-κB/MAPK 抑制、PI3K/AKT 相关生存信号传导、NRF2 相关抗氧化反应以及炎症和再生网络的 microRNA 依赖性重塑。其他证据支持对血脊髓屏障修复、血管生成、星形胶质细胞重编程、轴突生长、髓鞘再生和突触可塑性的影响，尽管其中许多结果仍然是标记驱动的，并且需要通过货物功能丧失、通路阻断、生物分布、电生理学和电路水平测定进行更强的因果验证。生物工程方法，包括亲代细胞预处理、货物富集、表面靶向和水凝胶或支架辅助的持续递送，扩大了 MSC-EV 的治疗潜力，但也增加了产品的复杂性。人类证据仍处于初步阶段：早期鞘内注射同种异体人脐带 MSC 衍生的 EV 制剂（研究人员报告为外泌体）支持可行性和短期安全性，但尚未在充分有力的随机试验中确定疗效。使用结构化叙述搜索策略、明确的资格标准和预定义的证据映射规则，本综述综合了机械、p……

items.title: Sex-associated neuroinflammatory and astrocytic responses in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis: evidence from clinical cohorts and a TDP-43 N390D mouse model.
items.authors: Wenfei Yu; Bing Zhao; Mingjie Ma; Ninglu Gao; Yan Yun; Xiaohan Sun; Kai Shao; Pengfei Lin
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Sex differences are increasingly recognized as important modifiers of neuroimmune processes in neurodegenerative disorders. However, the sex-associated clinical phenotypes and underlying neuroinflammatory mechanisms in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) remain poorly understood. This study integrated multimodal clinical assessments, cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) neuroimmune biomarkers, neuroimaging-based glymphatic metrics, and complementary animal analyses to characterize shared and sex-associated alterations in male and female ALS patients. METHODS: Two independent cohorts including 158 newly diagnosed ALS patients and 112 healthy controls (HCs) underwent evaluations of motor function, cognition, sleep disturbances, and emotional symptoms. Glymphatic function was assessed using choroid plexus volume (CPV), diffusion-derived analysis along the perivascular space (ALPS) index, and white-matter free-water (FW) fraction. In the original cohort, 12 CSF biomarkers spanning astrocytic activation, neuroinflammation, TDP-43 pathology, synaptic dysfunction, and axonal injury were quantified, and glial fibrillary acidic protein (GFAP), interleukin-6 (IL-6), and interleukin-18 (IL-18) were further examined in an independent verification cohort. Complementary neuroimmune alterations were further examined in TDP-43 N390D knock-in mice using ELISA and immunofluorescence. RESULTS: Male ALS patients showed markedly elevated CSF GFAP, IL-6, and IL-18 compared with female ALS patients and HCs after false discovery rate correction (q < 0.05). Female ALS patients exhibited increased CSF IL-6 versus HCs, whereas GFAP and IL-18 levels were unchanged. Female ALS patients also demonstrated more severe depressive symptoms and post-traumatic stress disorder than male ALS patients and HCs (p < 0.05). Both sexes displayed glymphatic impairment characterized by increased CPV and FW and reduced ALPS index, as well as pronounced sleep disturbances relative to HCs (all p < 0.05), with no clear sex-related differences. Complementary animal data showed that, at a fixed chronological age, male TDP-43 N390D mice exhibited more severe motor impairment accompanied by higher brain levels of GFAP, IL-6, and IL-18 and more prominent astrocyte-associated IL-6 and IL-18 signals than female mutant mice. Although microglial activation was also observed in TDP-43 N390D mice, no clear sex-related difference was detected at the sampled age. CONCLUSIONS: This multimodal clinical-translational study reveals sex-associated neuroinflammatory heterogeneity in ALS. Male patients exhibit a more pronounced GFAP-, IL-6-, and IL-18-related inflammatory profile, whereas female patients display more prominent affective disturbances. Glymphatic dysfunction and sleep impairment emerge as common pathological pathways across sexes. These findings highlight sex as a crucial biological variable shaping ALS heterogeneity and underscore the importance of incorporating sex-stratified analyses in future ALS neuroimmune research and clinical trials.
items.title_en: Sex-associated neuroinflammatory and astrocytic responses in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis: evidence from clinical cohorts and a TDP-43 N390D mouse model.
items.title_cn: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症中性别相关的神经炎症和星形细胞反应：来自临床队列和 TDP-43 N390D 小鼠模型的证据。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：性别差异越来越被认为是神经退行性疾病中神经免疫过程的重要调节因素。然而，肌萎缩侧索硬化症 (ALS) 中与性别相关的临床表型和潜在的神经炎症机制仍知之甚少。这项研究整合了多模式临床评估、脑脊液 (CSF) 神经免疫生物标志物、基于神经影像的类淋巴指标和补充动物分析，以描述男性和女性 ALS 患者共有的和性别相关的改变。方法：两个独立队列，包括 158 名新诊断的 ALS 患者和 112 名健康对照 (HC)，接受了运动功能、认知、睡眠障碍和情绪症状的评估。使用脉络丛体积（CPV）、沿血管周围空间（ALPS）指数的扩散衍生分析和白质游离水（FW）分数评估类淋巴功能。在最初的队列中，对涵盖星形细胞活化、神经炎症、TDP-43 病理学、突触功能障碍和轴突损伤的 12 种脑脊液生物标志物进行了定量，并在独立验证队列中进一步检查了胶质纤维酸性蛋白 (GFAP)、白细胞介素 6 (IL-6) 和白细胞介素 18 (IL-18)。使用 ELISA 和免疫荧光在 TDP-43 N390D 敲入小鼠中进一步检查补充神经免疫改变。结果：在错误发现率校正后，与女性 ALS 患者和 HC 相比，男性 ALS 患者的 CSF GFAP、IL-6 和 IL-18 显着升高（q < 0.05）。与 HC 相比，女性 ALS 患者的 CSF IL-6 有所增加，而 GFAP 和 IL-18 水平则没有变化。女性 ALS 患者还表现出比男性 ALS 患者和 HC 更严重的抑郁症状和创伤后应激障碍（p < 0.05）。两性均表现出类淋巴损伤，其特征是 CPV 和 FW 增加、ALPS 指数降低，以及相对于 HC 的明显睡眠障碍（所有 p < 0.05），但没有明显的性别相关差异。补充动物数据表明，在固定的年龄，雄性 TDP-43 N390D 小鼠表现出更严重的运动障碍，并伴随着更高的大脑水平……

items.title: FcγR- and CD9-dependent synapse-engulfing microglia in the thalamus drive cognitive impairment following cortical brain damage in mice.
items.authors: Ken Matoba; Takahiro Kochi; Oluwaseun Fatoba; Md Sorwer Alam Parvez; Inssaf Berkiks; Yassin R Mreyoud; Harrison Strong; Jana H Badrani
items.abstract: Chronic neuroinflammation gives rise to diverse microglial states across the brain, yet how region-specific microglial remodeling contributes to cognitive dysfunction remains unclear. Here we report that synapse-engulfing microglia in the thalamus drive cognitive impairment after cortical brain damage in mice, primarily studied in females. Region-specific manipulations of microglia during the chronic phase show that reactive microglial changes in the thalamus, but not in the hippocampus, impair recognition memory. Single-cell RNA sequencing reveals an enrichment of synapse-engulfing CD9hi microglia in the thalamus. Antibody-based CD9 blockade in the thalamus, as well as microglia-selective CD9 disruption, rescues thalamic synaptic loss, restores neuronal activity, and improves recognition memory. Further analysis shows that the blood-brain barrier disruption and subsequent γ-immunoglobulin (IgG) extravasation facilitate the generation of CD9hi microglia in an Fcγ receptor III-dependent manner. These findings demonstrate that the induction of synapse-engulfing CD9hi microglia in the thalamus by IgG/FcγRIII signaling drives recognition memory deficits following cortical damage.
items.title_en: FcγR- and CD9-dependent synapse-engulfing microglia in the thalamus drive cognitive impairment following cortical brain damage in mice.
items.title_cn: 丘脑中 FcγR 和 CD9 依赖性突触吞噬小胶质细胞在小鼠皮质脑损伤后导致认知障碍。
items.abstract_cn: 慢性神经炎症会导致大脑中不同的小胶质细胞状态，但区域特异性小胶质细胞重塑如何导致认知功能障碍仍不清楚。在这里，我们报告说，丘脑中吞噬突触的小胶质细胞在小鼠皮质脑损伤后导致认知障碍，主要在雌性小鼠中进行研究。慢性期小胶质细胞的区域特异性操作表明，丘脑中的小胶质细胞的反应性变化（而不是海马体中的）会损害识别记忆。单细胞 RNA 测序揭示了丘脑中突触吞噬 CD9hi 小胶质细胞的富集。基于抗体的丘脑 CD9 阻断以及小胶质细胞选择性 CD9 破坏可以挽救丘脑突触损失，恢复神经元活动并改善识别记忆。进一步分析表明，血脑屏障破坏和随后的 γ-免疫球蛋白 (IgG) 外渗促进了 CD9hi 小胶质细胞以 Fcγ 受体 III 依赖性方式产生。这些发现表明，IgG/FcγRIII 信号传导在丘脑中诱导突触吞噬 CD9hi 小胶质细胞会导致皮质损伤后的识别记忆缺陷。

items.title: Microglia-specific NLRP3 inhibition mitigates hippocampal neuroinflammation and cognitive deficits after hemorrhagic shock with resuscitation.
items.authors: Ya-Mei Zhang; Meng-Yue Wang; Zhong-Yong Zhang; Xin-Yu Yang; Hong-Lian Duan; Jian-Kai Sun; Xiao-Yi Ma; Rong-Xin Song
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Cognitive dysfunction is a prevalent mental health problem following hemorrhagic shock with resuscitation (HSR). Our previous work indicated that neuroinflammation caused by nucleotide-binding oligomerization domain-like receptor protein 3 (NLRP3), which is modulated by glial cells, such as microglia, is potentially significant in developing emotional and cognitive dysfunction. However, little is known about the potential of microglial NLRP3 to treat HSR-induced cognitive dysfunction. Therefore, this study established an HSR rodent model to investigate whether microglial NLRP3 represents a potential therapeutic target for improving cognitive dysfunction after HSR. METHODS: An HSR model was developed by inducing bleeding and retransfusion in mice. The Morris water maze and Novel object recognition tests were used for behavioral evaluation. To selectively knock out the NLRP3 inflammasome in microglia, the AAV‑CX3CR1‑Cre (pAAV‑CX3CR1‑NLS‑Cre‑P2A‑EGFP‑3xFLAG‑WPRE) virus was stereotaxically injected into the hippocampal CA1 region of male C57BL/6 mice with NLRP3flox/flox. Immunofluorescence and local field potential recordings were used to assess pathological alterations at different intervals after injury. RESULTS: Our findings indicated that the NLRP3 inhibitor MCC950 significantly reversed HSR-induced lower recognition index, increased escape latency, reduced platform crossings, decreased θ and γ power and θ-γ phase coupling, decreased intensity of PSD95 and Synaptophysin, increased number of Iba1+ cells, normalized soma size and total process length cell of Iba1, and increased colocalization of cleaved caspase-1 and interleukin-18 with Iba-1 in the CA1 area of the hippocampus. It also significantly alleviated the HSR-induced cognitive dysfunction. Moreover, we observed that HSR-induced cognitive dysfunction, neuroinflammation, and synaptic plasticity damage may be reversed by knocking out NLRP3 in the hippocampal CA1 microglia. CONCLUSION: Our study demonstrates that inhibition of microglia‑specific NLRP3 can mitigate cognitive impairment following HSR, identifying microglial NLRP3 as a promising therapeutic target. This effect may be associated with suppressing pyroptosis via the NLRP3 signaling pathway in microglia.
items.title_en: Microglia-specific NLRP3 inhibition mitigates hippocampal neuroinflammation and cognitive deficits after hemorrhagic shock with resuscitation.
items.title_cn: 小胶质细胞特异性 NLRP3 抑制可减轻失血性休克复苏后的海马神经炎症和认知缺陷。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：认知功能障碍是失血性休克复苏（HSR）后普遍存在的心理健康问题。我们之前的工作表明，由小胶质细胞等神经胶质细胞调节的核苷酸结合寡聚化结构域样受体蛋白 3 (NLRP3) 引起的神经炎症可能对情绪和认知功能障碍的发展具有重要意义。然而，人们对小胶质细胞 NLRP3 治疗 HSR 诱导的认知功能障碍的潜力知之甚少。因此，本研究建立了HSR啮齿动物模型，以研究小胶质细胞NLRP3是否是改善HSR后认知功能障碍的潜在治疗靶点。方法：通过诱导小鼠出血和再输血建立HSR模型。莫里斯水迷宫和新颖物体识别测试用于行为评估。为了选择性敲除小胶质细胞中的 NLRP3 炎症小体，将 AAV-CX3CR1-Cre (pAAV-CX3CR1-NLS-Cre-P2A-EGFP-3xFLAG-WPRE) 病毒与 NLRP3flox/flox 立体定位注射到雄性 C57BL/6 小鼠的海马 CA1 区。使用免疫荧光和局部场电位记录来评估损伤后不同时间间隔的病理变化。结果：我们的研究结果表明，NLRP3 抑制剂 MCC950 显着逆转了 HSR 引起的较低识别指数，增加了逃避潜伏期，减少了平台交叉，降低了 θ 和 γ 功率以及 θ-γ 相耦合，降低了 PSD95 和突触素的强度，增加了 Iba1+ 细胞的数量，使 Iba1 细胞胞体大小和总突长度标准化，并增加了 caspase-1 和 interleukin-18 与Iba-1 位于海马 CA1 区。它还显着缓解了 HSR 引起的认知功能障碍。此外，我们观察到，HSR 诱导的认知功能障碍、神经炎症和突触可塑性损伤可以通过敲除海马 CA1 小胶质细胞中的 NLRP3 来逆转。结论：我们的研究表明，抑制小胶质细胞特异性 NLRP3 可以减轻 HSR 后的认知障碍，将小胶质细胞 NLRP3 确定为有前途的治疗靶点。这种效应可能与……

items.title: Glial Cysteine Cathepsins: From Homeostasis to Neurodegeneration.
items.authors: Anja Suhadolc; Selena Horvat; Janko Kos; Anja Pišlar
items.abstract: Glial cells, namely microglia, astrocytes, and oligodendrocytes, play crucial roles in maintaining homeostasis in the central nervous system and orchestrating responses to injury, infection, and disease. Among the molecular regulators of glial function, cysteine cathepsins have emerged as key modulators of both physiological and pathological processes. These lysosomal peptidases are traditionally known for their housekeeping roles in protein degradation; however, accumulating evidence highlights their broader involvement in antigen presentation, microglial and astrocyte reactivity, inflammatory signalling, apoptosis, and myelination. Under normal conditions, cysteine cathepsins support essential functions in the central nervous system, including immune surveillance and tissue remodelling. Conversely, their dysregulation, characterized by overexpression, increased enzymatic activity, or mislocalization, can promote neuroinflammation and neurodegeneration, contributing to the pathogenesis of disorders such as Alzheimer's disease and multiple sclerosis. This review provides a comprehensive synthesis specifically focused on the diverse roles of cysteine cathepsins across major glial cell types, systematically summarizing current knowledge in microglia, astrocytes, and oligodendrocytes. We emphasize their cell type-specific, context-dependent, protective, and deleterious functions. Furthermore, we discuss mechanistic links between cysteine cathepsin activity and neurodegenerative processes and evaluate the therapeutic potential and current limitations of selectively targeting glial cysteine cathepsins. A deeper understanding of the context-dependent dual roles of these enzymes in brain physiology and pathology is critical for designing targeted interventions that could mitigate neuroinflammation and neurodegeneration.
items.title_en: Glial Cysteine Cathepsins: From Homeostasis to Neurodegeneration.
items.title_cn: 胶质半胱氨酸组织蛋白酶：从稳态到神经退行性变。
items.abstract_cn: 胶质细胞，即小胶质细胞、星形胶质细胞和少突胶质细胞，在维持中枢神经系统稳态以及协调对损伤、感染和疾病的反应中发挥着至关重要的作用。在神经胶质功能的分子调节剂中，半胱氨酸组织蛋白酶已成为生理和病理过程的关键调节剂。这些溶酶体肽酶传统上因其在蛋白质降解中的管家作用而闻名。然而，越来越多的证据强调它们更广泛地参与抗原呈递、小胶质细胞和星形胶质细胞反应性、炎症信号传导、细胞凋亡和髓鞘形成。在正常情况下，半胱氨酸组织蛋白酶支持中枢神经系统的基本功能，包括免疫监视和组织重塑。相反，它们的失调（以过度表达、酶活性增加或错位为特征）会促进神经炎症和神经变性，从而导致阿尔茨海默病和多发性硬化症等疾病的发病机制。这篇综述提供了全面的综述，特别关注半胱氨酸组织蛋白酶在主要神经胶质细胞类型中的不同作用，系统地总结了小胶质细胞、星形胶质细胞和少突胶质细胞的当前知识。我们强调它们的细胞类型特异性、环境依赖性、保护性和有害功能。此外，我们讨论了半胱氨酸组织蛋白酶活性与神经退行性过程之间的机制联系，并评估了选择性靶向神经胶质半胱氨酸组织蛋白酶的治疗潜力和当前局限性。更深入地了解这些酶在大脑生理学和病理学中的背景依赖性双重作用对于设计可以减轻神经炎症和神经变性的有针对性的干预措施至关重要。

【文献速递】胶质半胱氨酸组织蛋白酶：从稳态到神经退行性变。

英文题目：Glial Cysteine Cathepsins: From Homeostasis to Neurodegeneration.

研究背景：该研究与神经外科、脑损伤、脑积水或神经炎症相关，可能为课题设计和综述选题提供线索。

核心发现：胶质细胞，即小胶质细胞、星形胶质细胞和少突胶质细胞，在维持中枢神经系统稳态以及协调对损伤、感染和疾病的反应中发挥着至关重要的作用。在神经胶质功能的分子调节剂中，半胱氨酸组织蛋白酶已成为生理和病理过程的关键调节剂。这些溶酶体肽酶传统上因其在蛋白质降解中的管家作用而闻名。然而，越来越多的证据强调它们更广泛地参与抗原呈递、小胶质细胞和星形胶质细胞反应性、炎症信号传导、细胞凋亡和髓鞘形成。在正常情况下，半胱氨酸组织蛋白酶支持中枢神经系统的基本功能，包括免疫监视和组织重塑。相反，它们的失调（以过度表达、酶活性增加或错位为特征）会促进神经炎症和神经变性，从而导致阿尔茨海默病和多发性硬化症等疾病的发病机制。这篇综述提供了全面的综述，特别关注半胱氨酸组织蛋白酶在主要神经胶质细胞类型中的不同作用，系统地总结了小胶质细胞、星形胶质细胞和少突胶质细胞的当前知识。我们强调它们的细胞类型特异性、环境依赖性、保护性和有害功能。此外，我们讨论了半胱氨酸组织蛋白酶活性与神经退行性过程之间的机制联系，并评估了选择性靶向神经胶质半胱氨酸组织蛋白酶的治疗潜力和当前局限性。更深入地了解这些酶在大脑生理学和病理学中的背景依赖性双重作用对于设计可以减轻神经炎症和神经变性的有针对性的干预措施至关重要。

临床/科研意义：建议重点核对研究对象、模型、干预方式、主要终点和局限性，再判断是否纳入综述或选题库。

小满点评：这是一条需要人工复核全文的候选文献，当前摘要层面不宜过度外推。

items.title: aPKC exclusion from the apical cortex in enteroblasts maintains stem cell homeostasis in Drosophila.
items.abstract: Proper control of stem cell behavior is crucial for maintaining tissue homeostasis. In the Drosophila midgut, smooth septate junction (sSJ)-associated proteins play a crucial role in regulating intestinal stem cell (ISC) proliferation via atypical PKC (aPKC) activity. Here, we investigate the underlying mechanism. We found that aPKC in the apical cortex diminishes during enteroblast differentiation, in accordance with the apical accumulation of sSJ proteins. In sSJ protein-deficient conditions, aPKC remained in the apical cortex in enteroblasts, accompanied by ISC overproliferation. Manipulation of Kibra, an activator of the Hippo pathway with aPKC-binding properties, affected sSJ proteins depletion-induced ISC overproliferation in an aPKC-binding domain-dependent manner, revealing a link between aPKC and the Hippo- and/or Misshapen-Yorkie pathway in ISC proliferation. This study provides novel insights into the mechanism underlying stem cell regulation, in which an antagonistic interaction between aPKC and junctional proteins in differentiating progenitors is involved.
items.title_en: aPKC exclusion from the apical cortex in enteroblasts maintains stem cell homeostasis in Drosophila.
items.title_cn: 在果蝇中，肠成细胞中 aPKC 被排除在顶皮层之外可维持干​​细胞稳态。
items.abstract_cn: 正确控制干细胞行为对于维持组织稳态至关重要。在果蝇中肠中，平滑隔膜连接 (sSJ) 相关蛋白通过非典型 PKC (aPKC) 活性在调节肠干细胞 (ISC) 增殖中发挥着至关重要的作用。在这里，我们研究了潜在的机制。我们发现，在肠母细胞分化过程中，顶端皮质中的 aPKC 会减少，这与 sSJ 蛋白的顶端积累一致。在 sSJ 蛋白缺乏的条件下，aPKC 保留在肠成细胞的顶皮质中，并伴有 ISC 过度增殖。 Kibra（一种具有 aPKC 结合特性的 Hippo 通路激活剂）的操作，以 aPKC 结合域依赖性方式影响 sSJ 蛋白耗尽诱导的 ISC 过度增殖，揭示了 aPKC 与 ISC 增殖中的 Hippo 和/或 Misshapen-Yorkie 通路之间的联系。这项研究为干细胞调节的机制提供了新的见解，其中涉及分化祖细胞中 aPKC 和连接蛋白之间的拮抗相互作用。

items.title: TREM2 in glioma: Reprogramming the immune microenvironment from mechanistic understanding to clinical translation (Review).
items.authors: Junqi Fan; Hongyan Shen; Dan Liu; Songbai Luo; Qingqing Huang; Yi Wen; Libang Yuan
items.abstract: The poor prognosis of high‑grade gliomas, such as glioblastoma, is largely driven by a notably immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment (TME), wherein microglia and tumor‑associated macrophages play important roles. The present review summarizes the current evidence supporting triggering receptor expressed on myeloid cells 2 (TREM2) as a key immunoregulator in the glioma TME. The present review explores the context‑dependent dual role of TREM2, which can either be hijacked to promote immunosuppression and tumor progression or inhibit tumor progression through its notable functions in phagocytosis and antigen presentation. The present review also examines the clinical association of TREM2 expression with glioma grade and patient prognosis, evaluating its potential as a diagnostic and prognostic biomarker. Furthermore, the present review discusses the current landscape of TREM2‑targeted therapeutic strategies, from direct TREM2 inhibition and myeloid‑targeted immunocytokines to nano‑engineered drug delivery systems, and addresses the core translational challenges of these strategies. Looking forward, the importance of leveraging spatial multi‑omics and artificial intelligence to decipher the functional heterogeneity of TREM2 and to guide precision immunotherapy is highlighted. In conclusion, the present review provides a comprehensive framework for understanding the role of TREM2 in glioma; this receptor serves not only as a biomarker for glioma, but as an important signaling hub in the glioma TME. Therefore, the present review aims to support the development of novel therapeutic strategies targeting the immune microenvironment in glioma.
items.title_en: TREM2 in glioma: Reprogramming the immune microenvironment from mechanistic understanding to clinical translation (Review).
items.title_cn: 胶质瘤中的 TREM2：将免疫微环境从机械理解重新编程到临床转化（综述）。
items.abstract_cn: 高级别胶质瘤（例如胶质母细胞瘤）的预后不良，很大程度上是由明显的免疫抑制性肿瘤微环境（TME）驱动的，其中小胶质细胞和肿瘤相关巨噬细胞发挥着重要作用。本综述总结了当前支持骨髓细胞表达触发受体 2 (TREM2) 作为神经胶质瘤 TME 中关键免疫调节剂的证据。本综述探讨了 TREM2 的背景依赖性双重作用，它可以被劫持以促进免疫抑制和肿瘤进展，也可以通过其在吞噬作用和抗原呈递中的显着功能来抑制肿瘤进展。本综述还研究了 TREM2 表达与神经胶质瘤分级和患者预后的临床关联，评估其作为诊断和预后生物标志物的潜力。此外，本综述讨论了 TREM2 靶向治疗策略的当前前景，从直接 TREM2 抑制和髓样靶向免疫细胞因子到纳米工程药物递送系统，并解决了这些策略的核心转化挑战。展望未来，利用空间多组学和人工智能来破译 TREM2 的功能异质性并指导精准免疫治疗的重要性凸显。总之，本综述为理解 TREM2 在神经胶质瘤中的作用提供了一个全面的框架；该受体不仅作为神经胶质瘤的生物标志物，而且作为神经胶质瘤 TME 中的重要信号中枢。因此，本综述旨在支持针对神经胶质瘤免疫微环境的新型治疗策略的开发。

items.title: Targeting IL-33 in Precision Neuroimmunology: Cellular Mechanisms and Therapeutic Strategies for CNS Disorders.
items.journal: Journal of neuroimmune pharmacology : the official journal of the Society on NeuroImmune Pharmacology
items.authors: Lili Li; Shuting Wang; Lian Duan; Luyu Zhang; Hongmu Yan; Yue Zhu; Luyang Tao; Yuan Gao
items.abstract: Interleukin-33 (IL-33), an alarmin cytokine of the IL-1 family, has emerged as a pivotal regulator of neuroimmune interactions in the central nervous system (CNS). Acting through its receptor ST2, IL-33 orchestrates diverse immune responses by modulating microglial polarization, shaping T cell differentiation, activating type 2 innate lymphoid cells (ILC2s), and engaging mast cell-macrophage regulatory circuits. Across distinct neurological disorders, including epilepsy, stroke, traumatic brain injury (TBI), Parkinson's disease (PD), Alzheimer's disease (AD), multiple sclerosis (MS), cerebral malaria, and glioma, IL-33 exerts both protective and pathogenic effects in a context-dependent manner. In epilepsy, IL-33 modulates neuroinflammation and neuronal excitability; in stroke, it attenuates acute neurovascular injury while influencing post-stroke remodeling; in AD, it enhances amyloid-β clearance and mitigates chronic neuroinflammation; in MS, it regulates autoimmune demyelination via T cell and innate immune pathways. These shared yet disease-specific mechanisms underscore IL-33's central role in neuroimmune homeostasis and its potential as a precision therapeutic target. Future research integrating multi-disease models, temporal disease staging, and single-cell multi-omics will be essential to define the conditions under which IL-33 modulation yields maximal therapeutic benefit.
items.title_en: Targeting IL-33 in Precision Neuroimmunology: Cellular Mechanisms and Therapeutic Strategies for CNS Disorders.
items.title_cn: 精准神经免疫学中的靶向 IL-33：中枢神经系统疾病的细胞机制和治疗策略。
items.abstract_cn: 白介素 33 (IL-33) 是 IL-1 家族的一种警报素细胞因子，已成为中枢神经系统 (CNS) 神经免疫相互作用的关键调节因子。 IL-33 通过其受体 ST2 发挥作用，通过调节小胶质细胞极化、塑造 T 细胞分化、激活 2 型先天淋巴细胞 (ILC2) 以及参与肥大细胞-巨噬细胞调节回路来协调多种免疫反应。在不同的神经系统疾病中，包括癫痫、中风、创伤性脑损伤 (TBI)、帕金森病 (PD)、阿尔茨海默病 (AD)、多发性硬化症 (MS)、脑型疟疾和神经胶质瘤，IL-33 以依赖于环境的方式发挥保护作用和致病作用。在癫痫中，IL-33 调节神经炎症和神经元兴奋性；在中风中，它可以减轻急性神经血管损伤，同时影响中风后的重塑；在 AD 中，它可以增强β-淀粉样蛋白的清除并减轻慢性神经炎症；在多发性硬化症中，它通过 T 细胞和先天免疫途径调节自身免疫性脱髓鞘。这些共享但疾病特异性的机制强调了 IL-33 在神经免疫稳态中的核心作用及其作为精准治疗靶点的潜力。未来的研究整合多种疾病模型、暂时性疾病分期和单细胞多组学对于确定 IL-33 调节产生最大治疗效果的条件至关重要。

items.title: Emerging mechanisms and targeted therapy of PANoptosis in neurological diseases.
items.authors: Qiongyan Tang; Minmin Xu; Xuemei Xiao; Jing Cao; Weimin Yang
items.abstract: PANoptosis is a distinct inflammatory and lytic cell death pathway, orchestrated by the PANoptosome and executed through caspases and receptor-interacting protein kinases (RIPKs). Unlike other forms of programmed cell death, PANoptosis integrates components from multiple death signaling cascades. To date, several PANoptosome complexes - such as those nucleated by ZBP1, AIM2, RIPK1, and NLRP12 - have been characterized. These supramolecular assemblies form via domain-domain interactions upon detection of pathogen-associated or damage-associated signals. By eliminating infected and compromised cells, this coordinated pathway helps maintain tissue homeostasis, while its synchronized release of inflammatory cytokines and damage-associated molecular patterns (DAMPs) enhances innate immune responses, resulting in more effective pathogen clearance compared to any single cell death mechanism. Growing evidence underscores the relevance of PANoptosis across a spectrum of pathological conditions, including neurological disorders, infections, inflammatory diseases, cancer, and homeostatic imbalances, often mediated by PANoptosis-associated proteins. In neurological contexts - such as stroke, Parkinson's disease, Alzheimer's disease, and traumatic brain injury - PANoptosis activation correlates with disease progression and prognosis, highlighting its potential as a therapeutic target. In this review, we systematically outline the molecular foundations of PANoptosis, examine its role in neurological diseases, and summarize current pharmacological and methodological strategies for its modulation. A deeper understanding of PANoptosis may inform the identification of novel therapeutic targets for neurological disorders.
items.title_en: Emerging mechanisms and targeted therapy of PANoptosis in neurological diseases.
items.title_cn: 神经系统疾病中全视神经病变的新机制和靶向治疗。
items.abstract_cn: PANoptosis 是一种独特的炎症和裂解性细胞死亡途径，由 PANoptosome 精心策划，并通过半胱天冬酶和受体相互作用蛋白激酶 (RIPK) 执行。与其他形式的程序性细胞死亡不同，PANoptosis 整合了多个死亡信号级联的成分。迄今为止，几种 PANoptosome 复合物（例如由 ZBP1、AIM2、RIPK1 和 NLRP12 成核的复合物）已得到表征。这些超分子组装体在检测到病原体相关或损伤相关信号时通过域-域相互作用形成。通过消除受感染和受损的细胞，这种协调途径有助于维持组织稳态，同时其同步释放炎症细胞因子和损伤相关分子模式（DAMP）可增强先天免疫反应，从而比任何单细胞死亡机制更有效地清除病原体。越来越多的证据强调了 PANoptosis 与一系列病理状况的相关性，包括神经系统疾病、感染、炎症性疾病、癌症和稳态失衡，通常由 PANoptosis 相关蛋白介导。在神经系统疾病中，例如中风、帕金森病、阿尔茨海默病和创伤性脑损伤，全视神经病变激活与疾病进展和预后相关，凸显了其作为治疗靶点的潜力。在这篇综述中，我们系统地概述了 PANoptosis 的分子基础，研究了其在神经系统疾病中的作用，并总结了当前其调节的药理学和方法学策略。对 PANoptosis 的更深入了解可能有助于确定神经系统疾病的新治疗靶点。

items.title: Modeling Parkinson's pathology in human iPSC dopaminergic neurons uncovers key mechanisms of Lewy body formation and heterogeneity.
items.authors: Anne-Laure Mahul-Mellier; Lukas van den Heuvel; Maxime Teixeira; Manel L N Boussouf; Gaspard Oudinot; Amélie Thonet; Davide Speri; Yllza Jasiqi
items.abstract: The aggregation of alpha-synuclein (aSyn) into intraneuronal inclusions of heterogeneous morphology, known as Lewy bodies (LBs), is a defining hallmark of Parkinson's disease (PD); yet, our understanding of the mechanisms underpinning their formation and heterogeneity remains incomplete. Here, we present a human isogenic induced pluripotent stem cell-derived dopaminergic neuron (iDA) model that faithfully recapitulates the diverse biochemical, morphological, and ultrastructural features of LB neuropathology. The iDA model accurately reproduces the temporal relationships between neuritic and cell-body aSyn pathology and recapitulates the proteome, posttranslational modifications, and morphological diversity of aSyn aggregates found in human PD tissue. Moreover, our work provides critical insight into how different pathways to aSyn fibrillization and the complex interaction between aSyn fibrils and membranous organelles shape the morphological diversity of LB-like inclusions. This model represents a versatile platform to investigate the mechanisms of pathology formation, maturation, and neuronal dysfunction and to develop diagnostics and therapeutics that account for the diversity of aSyn pathology in PD and related synucleinopathies.
items.title_en: Modeling Parkinson's pathology in human iPSC dopaminergic neurons uncovers key mechanisms of Lewy body formation and heterogeneity.
items.title_cn: 对人类 iPSC 多巴胺能神经元中的帕金森病病理学进行建模，揭示了路易体形成和异质性的关键机制。
items.abstract_cn: α-突触核蛋白 (aSyn) 聚集成异质形态的神经元内包涵体，称为路易体 (LB)，是帕金森病 (PD) 的一个明确标志；然而，我们对其形成和异质性的机制的理解仍然不完整。在这里，我们提出了一种人类同基因诱导多能干细胞来源的多巴胺能神经元 (iDA) 模型，该模型忠实地概括了 LB 神经病理学的多种生化、形态和超微结构特征。 iDA 模型准确地再现了神经炎和细胞体 aSyn 病理学之间的时间关系，并概括了人类 PD 组织中发现的 aSyn 聚集体的蛋白质组、翻译后修饰和形态多样性。此外，我们的工作提供了关于 aSyn 原纤维化的不同途径以及 aSyn 原纤维和膜细胞器之间的复杂相互作用如何塑造 LB 样内含物的形态多样性的重要见解。该模型代表了一个多功能平台，用于研究病理形成、成熟和神经元功能障碍的机制，并开发解释 PD 和相关突触核蛋白病中 aSyn 病理多样性的诊断和治疗方法。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Microglial TDP-43 mediates myelin refinement and represses Tyrobp cryptic exon inclusion in mice.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Anne-Claire Compagnion; Andranik Ivanov; Anil Rana; Felipe Espinoza; Thomas Sandmann; Fanny S Martineau; Katia Monsorno; Roberta Facchinetti
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: TDP-43 proteinopathy is a hallmark of neurodegenerative disorders such as amyotrophic lateral sclerosis and frontotemporal dementia where mislocalization of TDP-43 has been observed in neurons and glial cells. However, the role of TDP-43 in microglia and the consequences of its loss of function remain unexplored. Combining magnetic resonance imaging, and confocal, and electron microscopy, we uncovered structural changes and myelin abnormalities in the early postnatal brain of mice lacking microglial TDP-43. Spatial transcriptomics further revealed an enriched interferon-responsive signature associated with oligodendrocyte dysfunction. Early depletion of microglial TDP-43 led to motor deficits in adult mice. Mechanistically, knocking out TDP-43 impaired microglial ability to engulf and degrade myelin. It also led to cryptic exon inclusion in the Tyrobp mRNA, resulting in truncated DAP12 protein, thus causing defective TREM2 signaling. Our findings reveal a role for TDP-43 in regulating the TREM2-DAP12 axis in mice, highlighting a previously unrecognized mechanism through which TDP-43 controls microglial function.

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Human embryonic stem cell-derived dopaminergic cells for Parkinson's disease: a phase 1/2 open-label trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: G Paul; H Bjartmarz; A Kirkeby; J Nelander; R Smith; S Kayhanian; A Evans; B Harry
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Parkinson's disease (PD) is characterized by progressive loss of nigral dopaminergic neurons, resulting in disabling motor symptoms. Intracerebral transplantation of stem cell-derived dopaminergic progenitors to replace lost endogenous dopaminergic neurons offers a new potentially restorative therapeutic approach for PD. Here we report the 12-month primary safety end point and interim efficacy outcomes from a phase 1/2, open-label, multicenter trial evaluating STEM-PD, a cryopreserved, off-the-shelf dopaminergic progenitor product derived from human pluripotent stem cells. Eight individuals with moderate PD underwent bilateral intraputaminal transplantation at two escalating doses (n = 4 per cohort), followed by 12 months of immunosuppression. Seven participants completed 12-month follow-up; one participant died from a pulmonary infection. No serious adverse events were attributed to the cell product, no graft-induced dyskinesias were observed and serial magnetic resonance imaging showed no evidence of tumor formation. These findings support the feasibility and favorable safety profile of human pluripotent stem cell-derived dopaminergic progenitor transplantation in this early-phase study, with risks primarily associated with the immunosuppression regimen. Ongoing follow-up to 36 months will further evaluate durability, clinical outcomes and graft function. ClinicalTrials.gov identifier: NCT05635409 .
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Human embryonic stem cell-derived dopaminergic cells for Parkinson's disease: a phase 1/2 open-label trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 人类胚胎干细胞衍生的多巴胺能细胞治疗帕金森病：1/2 期开放标签试验。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 帕金森病 (PD) 的特点是黑质多巴胺能神经元逐渐丧失，导致运动障碍症状。脑内移植干细胞衍生的多巴胺能祖细胞来替代丢失的内源性多巴胺能神经元，为帕金森病提供了一种新的潜在恢复治疗方法。在此，我们报告了一项 1/2 期、开放标签、多中心试验的 12 个月主要安全终点和中期疗效结果，该试验评估了 STEM-PD，这是一种源自人类多能干细胞的冷冻保存、现成的多巴胺能祖细胞产品。 8 名中度 PD 患者接受了两次递增剂量的双侧壳核内移植（每组 n = 4 例），然后接受 12 个月的免疫抑制。 7 名参与者完成了 12 个月的随访；一名参与者死于肺部感染。细胞产物没有引起严重的不良事件，没有观察到移植物引起的运动障碍，并且连续磁共振成像没有显示肿瘤形成的证据。这些发现支持了这项早期研究中人类多能干细胞衍生的多巴胺能祖细胞移植的可行性和良好的安全性，其风险主要与免疫抑制方案相关。持续随访 36 个月将进一步评估耐久性、临床结果和移植功能。 ClinicalTrials.gov 标识符：NCT05635409。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Developmental genetic determinants of the human cerebrospinal fluid-ventricular system.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Garrett Allington; Evan Dennis; Qiang Li; Stephen McGee; Neel H Mehta; Kedous Y Mekbib; Izuho Hatada; Matthew C Weston
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Primary enlargement of the cerebrospinal fluid (CSF)-filled brain ventricles, known as congenital cerebral ventriculomegaly (CCV), is a hallmark of congenital hydrocephalus. CCV is also enigmatically but frequently associated with autism and other neurodevelopmental disorders. To gain insight into the developmental genetic regulation of the human CSF-ventricular system, we conducted an integrated, multiomic study of about 2700 trio-based exomes from patients with primary CCV. We found that about 25% of cases were associated with rare, damaging de novo variants in mutation-intolerant genes, many of which are linked to other dominant Mendelian disorders. Thirty-five exome-wide significant CCV genes and dozens of other high-confidence CCV genes converged on pathways involved in ATP-dependent Brahma-related gene 1/Brahma-associated factor chromatin remodeling, histone H3 lysine 4 methylation, and phosphoinositide 3-kinase signaling. Knockout of selected CCV genes in mouse models supported that de novo variants in CCV genes caused ventriculomegaly by impairing both CSF dynamics and cortical cytoarchitecture through dysregulation of neuroprogenitor cell growth and maturation in the ventricular and subventricular zones. These findings indicated that genetic and epigenetic programs coordinate the "hand-in-glove" development of the CSF-ventricular system with that of the cerebral cortex and establish a genetic connection between CCV and neurodevelopmental disorders, potentially explaining why some patients with hydrocephalus continue to exhibit CCV and neurodevelopmental disorders despite CSF shunting. We suggest that combined brain imaging and whole-exome sequencing could enable early detection of, and intervention for, autism and other neurodevelopmental disorders.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Developmental genetic determinants of the human cerebrospinal fluid-ventricular system.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 人类脑脊液心室系统的发育遗传决定因素。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 充满脑脊液 (CSF) 的脑室原发性增大，称为先天性脑室扩大 (CCV)，是先天性脑积水的标志。 CCV 也很神秘，但经常与自闭症和其他神经发育障碍相关。为了深入了解人类脑脊液-脑室系统的发育遗传调控，我们对来自原发性 CCV 患者的约 2700 个基于三重体的外显子组进行了一项综合多组学研究。我们发现，大约 25% 的病例与不耐受突变的基因中罕见的、破坏性的从头变异有关，其中许多与其他显性孟德尔疾病有关。 35 个全外显子组显着的 CCV 基因和数十个其他高置信度 CCV 基因聚集在参与 ATP 依赖性 Brahma 相关基因 1/Brahma 相关因子染色质重塑、组蛋白 H3 赖氨酸 4 甲基化和磷酸肌醇 3 激酶信号传导的通路上。在小鼠模型中敲除选定的 CCV 基因支持了 CCV 基因的从头变异通过脑室和脑室下区神经祖细胞生长和成熟失调损害脑脊液动力学和皮质细胞结构而引起脑室扩大。这些发现表明，遗传和表观遗传程序协调脑脊液脑室系统与大脑皮层“密切相关”的发育，并在 CCV 和神经发育障碍之间建立遗传联系，这可能解释了为什么一些脑积水患者尽管存在 CSF 分流，但仍然表现出 CCV 和神经发育障碍。我们认为，结合脑成像和全外显子组测序可以实现自闭症和其他神经发育障碍的早期检测和干预。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Single-nucleus multiome shows motor neuron glutamate overactivation in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Eriko Takeuchi; Yoshiaki Yasumizu; Junko Morita; Masakazu Ishikawa; Kotaro Ogawa; Daisuke Motooka; Daisuke Okuzaki; Miho Nagata
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) is a neurodegenerative disease that causes motor neuron degeneration. However, the mechanisms underlying the selective vulnerability of motor neurons and the involvement of non-motor neuron cells in ALS remain unclear. To investigate ALS pathology at the cellular level, we performed a single-nucleus multiome analysis, including RNA sequencing and chromatin accessibility profiling, on the motor cortex (75 583 nuclei) and spinal cord (62 711 nuclei) from patients with ALS (n = 6) and controls (n = 6). Our results revealed significant gene expression changes specifically in spinal motor neurons, including upregulation of a metabotropic glutamate receptor, GRM5, and enhanced glutamate signalling. By integrating genome-wide association study data, we identified ALS-associated single nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs) in regulatory regions, suggesting cell-type-specific enrichment of risk, especially in microglia. These findings suggest that changes in spinal motor neurons and their surrounding environment, including glutamate signalling, may be involved in ALS pathology. The study also provides valuable resources for future research on the underlying mechanisms and potential therapeutic targets.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Single-nucleus multiome shows motor neuron glutamate overactivation in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 单核多组显示肌萎缩侧索硬化症中运动神经元谷氨酸过度激活。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）是一种导致运动神经元变性的神经退行性疾病。然而，运动神经元选择性脆弱性和非运动神经元细胞参与 ALS 的机制仍不清楚。为了在细胞水平上研究 ALS 病理学，我们对 ALS 患者 (n = 6) 和对照 (n = 6) 的运动皮层（75 583 个核）和脊髓（62 711 个核）进行了单核多组分析，包括 RNA 测序和染色质可及性分析。我们的结果揭示了脊髓运动神经元中的显着基因表达变化，包括代谢型谷氨酸受体 GRM5 的上调和谷氨酸信号传导的增强。通过整合全基因组关联研究数据，我们在调控区域鉴定了 ALS 相关的单核苷酸多态性 (SNP)，表明细胞类型特异性的风险富集，尤其是在小胶质细胞中。这些发现表明脊髓运动神经元及其周围环境（包括谷氨酸信号传导）的变化可能与 ALS 病理有关。该研究还为未来研究潜在机制和潜在治疗靶点提供了宝贵的资源。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Fus-depleted oligodendrocytes reduce neuronal damage and Alzheimer's disease progression in the AppNL-G-F mouse.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Te-Hsuan Tung; Sudhagar Babu; Xiangting Tang; Alec L Sciutto; Micah Romer; Prathima Racha; Rong Xu; Victoria Fiesler
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is an age-dependent neurodegenerative disorder and represents the most common type of dementia, increasing in incidence at an alarming rate in the aging population. The hallmarks of the disease are amyloid plaque accumulation, microglia and astrocyte activation, and loss of presynaptic structure leading to cognitive decline. Recently, oligodendrocyte (OL) and myelin abnormalities have emerged as important contributors to the pathogenesis of AD. In normal brain homeostatic conditions, OL maintain neuronal health through myelin axon interactions and by supplying neurotrophic and metabolic support. How strengthening OL function may support neuronal health in AD neurodegeneration remains to be fully characterized and represents a gap in knowledge and a missed therapeutic opportunity. This study sought to examine how myelin and OL may improve neuronal deficits associated with AD. We have generated a novel mouse model (AD/cKO) by crossing the AppNL-G-F mouse, an established AD model, which carries three human AD mutations in the mouse App gene, with the FusOLcKO whose OL depleted of Fus (Fused in Sarcoma) produce thicker myelin associated with greater cholesterol biosynthesis. We evaluated spatial memory function with standardized cognitive testing. We evaluated microglia density and state, astrocytic activation and toxic phenotype, myelin density, cholesterol content, amyloid plaque burden, presynaptic structures, and neuronal hypoxic and oxidative damage in the hippocampus and cortex. We characterized the transcriptome of AD/cKO hippocampal OL compared to AD by using single-cell transcriptomic studies. Spatial working memory was fully preserved in the aged AD/cKO mouse relative to the AD mouse. This outcome was associated with reduced neuronal oxidative damage, preserved presynaptic structures at the amyloid plaque niches, and a shift in microglia state at the niches in both hippocampus and cortex. In contrast, amyloid plaque burden and microglia density were decreased in the hippocampus but not in cortex, uncoupling the neuronal and microglia effects from the amyloid burden. Fus dependent myelin increase was present in both hippocampus and cortex. Single-cell transcriptomics of AD/cKO hippocampal OL revealed upregulation of energy metabolism and antioxidant genes, suggesting a role of OL enhanced energy metabolism in mediating protection of neurons and affecting microglia state in AD pathology. This work provides new insight into how oligodendrocytes may protect neurons in AD, communicate with other glial cellular players, and point to potential targets for disease intervention aimed at slowing AD progression.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Fus-depleted oligodendrocytes reduce neuronal damage and Alzheimer's disease progression in the AppNL-G-F mouse.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: Fus 耗尽的少突胶质细胞可减少 AppNL-G-F 小鼠的神经元损伤和阿尔茨海默病进展。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 是一种年龄依赖性神经退行性疾病，是最常见的痴呆类型，在老龄化人口中发病率以惊人的速度增加。该疾病的特点是淀粉样斑块积聚、小胶质细胞和星形胶质细胞激活以及突触前结构丧失导致认知能力下降。最近，少突胶质细胞（OL）和髓磷脂异常已成为 AD 发病机制的重要贡献者。在正常的大脑稳态条件下，OL 通过髓磷脂轴突相互作用以及提供神经营养和代谢支持来维持神经元健康。加强 OL 功能如何支持 AD 神经变性中的神经元健康仍有待充分表征，这代表了知识上的差距和错失的治疗机会。本研究旨在探讨髓磷脂和 OL 如何改善与 AD 相关的神经元缺陷。我们通过将AppNL-G-F小鼠（一种已建立的AD模型，在小鼠App基因中携带三个人类AD突变）与FusOLcKO（其OL耗尽Fus（在肉瘤中融合）产生更厚的髓磷脂，与更多的胆固醇生物合成相关）杂交，产生了一种新型小鼠模型（AD/cKO）。我们通过标准化认知测试评估了空间记忆功能。我们评估了小胶质细胞密度和状态、星形胶质细胞活化和毒性表型、髓磷脂密度、胆固醇含量、淀粉样斑块负荷、突触前结构以及海马和皮层神经元缺氧和氧化损伤。我们通过单细胞转录组研究对 AD/cKO 海马 OL 的转录组与 AD 进行比较。相对于 AD 小鼠，老年 AD/cKO 小鼠的空间工作记忆得到了完全保留。这一结果与神经元氧化损伤的减少、淀粉样蛋白斑块突触前结构的保留以及海马和皮质中小胶质细胞状态的转变有关。相比之下，海马中的淀粉样斑块负荷和小胶质细胞密度降低，但皮质中并未降低，从而将神经元和小胶质细胞的影响与淀粉样蛋白负荷分开。 Fus 依赖性髓鞘质增加出现在海马和……

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Dual tumour-myeloid targeting of glioblastoma with GPNMB CAR-T cells.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Neil Savage; Shan Grewal; Muhammad Vaseem Shaikh; Franz J Zemp; Dillon Mckenna; Nicholas Mikolajewicz; Hinda Najem; Joanna Pyczek
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Glioblastoma is a lethal brain tumour for which current multimodal treatment rarely prevents recurrence1. Therapeutic failure is driven by extensive intratumoural cellular heterogeneity2 with a microenvironment dominated by tumour-associated macrophages that sustain tumour growth and immunosuppression3. Although chimeric antigen receptor (CAR)-T cell therapies are being developed for glioblastoma, sustained response has been undermined by non-uniform antigen expression, antigen loss and microenvironmental barriers that are not directly engaged by tumour-targeting designs4. These limitations motivate new strategies that address the disease as a coupled tumour-immune system rather than a single malignant compartment. Here we use a multi-omic target discovery platform to identify GPNMB as a dual-compartment antigen in glioblastoma. Anti-GPNMB CAR-T cells showed potent anti-tumour activity, with long-term disease control in orthotopic patient-derived xenografts and syngeneic glioma models through concomitant depletion of GPNMB+ tumour and immunosuppressive myeloid populations. By collapsing tumour control and microenvironmental reprogramming, these findings provide a new strategy for antigen selection and targeting in heterogenous, myeloid-rich solid cancers.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Dual tumour-myeloid targeting of glioblastoma with GPNMB CAR-T cells.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 使用 GPNMB CAR-T 细胞对胶质母细胞瘤进行双肿瘤-骨髓靶向治疗。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 胶质母细胞瘤是一种致命的脑肿瘤，目前的多模式治疗很少能防止复发1。治疗失败的原因是广泛的肿瘤内细胞异质性2，其微环境以维持肿瘤生长和免疫抑制的肿瘤相关巨噬细胞为主3。尽管针对胶质母细胞瘤的嵌合抗原受体 (CAR)-T 细胞疗法正在开发中，但持续的反应已被不均匀的抗原表达、抗原丢失和与肿瘤靶向设计不直接相关的微环境障碍所破坏。这些限制激发了新的策略，将这种疾病作为一个耦合的肿瘤免疫系统而不是单一的恶性区室来解决。在这里，我们使用多组学靶标发现平台将 GPNMB 鉴定为胶质母细胞瘤中的双室抗原。抗 GPNMB CAR-T 细胞显示出有效的抗肿瘤活性，通过同时消除 GPNMB+ 肿瘤和免疫抑制性骨髓细胞群，在原位患者来源的异种移植物和同基因神经胶质瘤模型中实现长期疾病控制。通过破坏肿瘤控制和微环境重编程，这些发现为异源、富含骨髓的实体癌的抗原选择和靶向提供了新策略。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: AI-predicted spatial transcriptomics unlocks breast cancer biomarkers from pathology.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Eldad D Shulman; Emma M Campagnolo; Roshan Lodha; Youngmin Chung; Amos Stemmer; Thomas Cantore; Beibei Ru; Tian-Gen Chang
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Spatial transcriptomics (ST) assays are transforming our understanding of tumor heterogeneity, but their high cost limits their application in large-scale biomarker discovery. Here, we present "Path2Space," a deep-learning model that predicts spatial gene expression directly from histopathology slides. Trained on extensive breast cancer ST data, Path2Space robustly predicts the spatial expression of thousands of genes, outperforming 21 established methods. Charting the tumor microenvironment (TME) of 976 breast cancer TCGA (The Cancer Genome Atlas) tumors, it accurately infers cell-type abundances and identifies three spatially defined breast cancer subgroups with distinct survival outcomes. Notably, the derived low-cost spatial TME landscapes enable more accurate predictions of patient response to chemotherapy and trastuzumab compared with costly conventional bulk-sequencing-based biomarkers. Path2Space thus offers a scalable, fast, and cost-effective alternative to molecular assays. It opens avenues for large cohort treatment biomarker discovery and translationally relevant insights into tumor biology, with potential applicability across many cancer indications.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: AI-predicted spatial transcriptomics unlocks breast cancer biomarkers from pathology.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 人工智能预测的空间转录组学从病理学中解锁乳腺癌生物标志物。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 空间转录组学 (ST) 检测正在改变我们对肿瘤异质性的理解，但其高昂的成本限制了它们在大规模生物标志物发现中的应用。在这里，我们提出了“Path2Space”，一种深度学习模型，可以直接从组织病理学幻灯片预测空间基因表达。经过大量乳腺癌 ST 数据的训练，Path2Space 可以稳健地预测数千个基因的空间表达，优于 21 种既定方法。它绘制了 976 个乳腺癌 TCGA（癌症基因组图谱）肿瘤的肿瘤微环境 (TME) 图表，准确推断了细胞类型丰度，并识别了三个空间定义的具有不同生存结果的乳腺癌亚组。值得注意的是，与昂贵的传统基于批量测序的生物标志物相比，衍生的低成本空间 TME 景观能够更准确地预测患者对化疗和曲妥珠单抗的反应。因此，Path2Space 为分子检测提供了一种可扩展、快速且经济高效的替代方案。它为大规模队列治疗生物标志物的发现和肿瘤生物学的转化相关见解开辟了途径，并具有跨许多癌症适应症的潜在适用性。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Multimodal clocks of human aging.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Jiaming Li; Beier Jiang; Wei Zhang; Junwei Hao; Zhili Liu; Qianzhao Ji; Yandong Zheng; Xiaoyong Lu
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Human aging is characterized by complex structural and functional decline, but quantifying its heterogeneity and assessing biological age remain challenges. We present the mCAS (multicentric Chinese aging standardized cohort) developed from 2,019 Chinese individuals aged 18-91 years. Integrating high-dimensional clinical, physiological, and molecular-level data, we constructed a three-tiered aging framework: the core capacity clock (CC-clock) to quantify clinical physiological decline, the multimodal clock (MM-clock) with extensive parameter coverage and enhanced predictive precision, and organ-associated aging clocks. Cross-layer analysis demonstrates that plasma protein clocks not only capture chronological age but also serve as efficient proxies for systemic physiological capacity. Leveraging this framework for discovery, we identified the age-dependent accumulation of coagulation factors as a driver of multi-organ senescence and systemic inflammatory activation. This study provides a foundational framework that bridges molecular signatures with functional decline, identifies new biomarkers for aging assessment, and reveals a novel translational driver of aging.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 人类衰老的多模式时钟。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 人类衰老的特点是复杂的结构和功能衰退，但量化其异质性和评估生物年龄仍然是挑战。我们提出了由 2,019 名 18-91 岁中国人开发的 mCAS（多中心中国老龄化标准化队列）。整合高维临床、生理和分子水平数据，我们构建了三层衰老框架：量化临床生理衰退的核心能力时钟（CC-clock）、具有广泛参数覆盖和增强预测精度的多模态时钟（MM-clock）以及器官相关衰老时钟。跨层分析表明，血浆蛋白时钟不仅可以捕获实际年龄，还可以作为全身生理能力的有效代表。利用这一发现框架，我们发现年龄依赖性的凝血因子积累是多器官衰老和全身炎症激活的驱动因素。这项研究提供了一个基础框架，将分子特征与功能衰退联系起来，确定了用于衰老评估的新生物标志物，并揭示了衰老的新转化驱动因素。

global_hot_topics.title: Treatment trajectories and patterns following non-medical switching to biosimilar adalimumab in patients with hidradenitis suppurativa: a retrospective observational multicenter study from Saudi Arabia.
global_hot_topics.authors: Ahmed Alamer; Taibah AbuTaki; Shareefa Mohammed Alonaizi; Dalal Saadoun Alsaadoun; Mukhtar Alomar
global_hot_topics.abstract: BACKGROUND: Adalimumab is the first biologic approved for moderate-to-severe hidradenitis suppurativa (HS). Considering potential cost savings, real-world data evaluating the prescribing patterns following a switch from the originator in HS remain limited. METHODS: We conducted a retrospective multicenter observational study (2019-2025) at two hospitals in Saudi Arabia. Adult HS patients who received originator adalimumab for ≥3 months, and then switched to its biosimilar for non-medical reasons for ≥3 months were included. Descriptive statistics summarized baseline characteristics. A Wilcoxon paired test compared treatment durations, and a Sankey diagram illustrated treatment pathways. RESULTS: A total of 40 patients were included (median age: 26 years; 62.5% male; median BMI: 31.6). Most presented with nodules (55.0%), abscesses (47.5%), and sinus tracts (37.5%). Among all treatment actions/pathways, 22.6% represented treatment escalation to an alternative biologic, specifically secukinumab or ustekinumab. Patients who were switched from biosimilar therapy demonstrated more severe disease involvement. Median duration of originator therapy was 6.0 months versus 21.0 months for biosimilar (p = 0.477), with no significant difference in treatment persistence. CONCLUSION: In this small real-world cohort, treatment escalation after switching to biosimilar adalimumab was observed in a subset of patients with more complex HS features. Larger studies using standardized severity measures are needed to confirm these observations. Hidradenitis suppurativa is a long-term skin condition that can cause painful lumps, abscesses, tunnels under the skin, and scarring. Adalimumab is one of the treatments used for moderate-to-severe hidradenitis suppurativa. In some hospitals, patients may be changed from the original adalimumab product to a biosimilar version, which is designed to be highly similar to the original version and may help reduce treatment costs.In this study, we reviewed 40 patients from two hospitals in Saudi Arabia who were changed from the original adalimumab to a biosimilar adalimumab for non-medical reasons, mainly because of hospital formulary changes. We examined prescribing patterns and treatment received after the switch.Some patients continued biosimilar adalimumab, while others required changes in their treatment plan. These changes included adding other medications, such as antibiotics or topical treatments, or switching to another biologic treatment. Patients who needed treatment changes often had more complex hidradenitis suppurativa features, such as nodules, abscesses, sinus tracts, scarring, or disease affecting more than one body area.This study describes real-world treatment patterns after switching to biosimilar adalimumab. The findings suggest that follow-up after switching may be important, especially for patients with more complex disease. Larger studies using standard disease severity measures are needed.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Treatment trajectories and patterns following non-medical switching to biosimilar adalimumab in patients with hidradenitis suppurativa: a retrospective observational multicenter study from Saudi Arabia.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 化脓性汗腺炎患者非药物转用生物仿制药阿达木单抗后的治疗轨迹和模式：来自沙特阿拉伯的一项回顾性观察性多中心研究。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 背景：阿达木单抗是第一个被批准用于治疗中重度化脓性汗腺炎（HS）的生物制剂。考虑到潜在的成本节省，评估 HS 发起者转换后的处方模式的实际数据仍然有限。方法：我们在沙特阿拉伯的两家医院进行了一项回顾性多中心观察研究（2019-2025）。接受原研阿达木单抗治疗 ≥3 个月，然后因非医疗原因改用其生物仿制药治疗 ≥3 个月的成人 HS 患者被纳入研究。描述性统计总结了基线特征。 Wilcoxon 配对测试比较了治疗持续时间，桑基图说明了治疗路径。结果：总共纳入 40 名患者（中位年龄：26 岁；62.5% 为男性；中位 BMI：31.6）。大多数表现为结节（55.0%）、脓肿（47.5%）和窦道（37.5%）。在所有治疗行动/途径中，22.6% 表示治疗升级至替代生物制剂，特别是苏金单抗或优特克单抗。从生物仿制药转为治疗的患者表现出更严重的疾病症状。原研药治疗的中位持续时间为 6.0 个月，而生物仿制药为 21.0 个月 (p = 0.477)，治疗持续性没有显着差异。结论：在这个小型现实世界队列中，在具有更复杂 HS 特征的患者亚组中观察到改用生物仿制药阿达木单抗后治疗升级。需要使用标准化严重程度测量的更大规模的研究来证实这些观察结果。化脓性汗腺炎是一种长期皮肤病，可引起疼痛性肿块、脓肿、皮下隧道和疤痕。阿达木单抗是用于中度至重度化脓性汗腺炎的治疗方法之一。在一些医院，患者可能会从原来的阿达木单抗产品改为生物仿制药版本，该版本的设计与原来的版本高度相似，可能有助于降低治疗成本。在这项研究中，我们回顾了来自沙特阿拉伯两家医院的 40 名患者，这些患者因非医疗原因从原来的阿达木单抗改为生物仿制药阿达木单抗，主要是因为医院处方的变化。我们考试……

global_hot_topics.title: A novel deep learning approach for privacy-preserving encoded EEG-based brain-computer interfaces with clinical LLM applications.
global_hot_topics.authors: Taslima Khanam; Siuly Siuly; Kate Wang; Hua Wang
global_hot_topics.abstract: PURPOSE: The rise of large language models (LLMs) such as GPT-4 and DeepSeek has transformed healthcare information processing by enabling natural language-based clinical reasoning. However, the integration of LLMs with privacy-sensitive biomedical signals, particularly electroencephalogram (EEG) data used in brain-computer interface (BCI) systems, remains underexplored. EEG signals, especially during motor imagery (MI) tasks, are critical for assistive neurotechnologies but pose significant privacy risks due to their capacity to reveal cognitive and medical information. Traditional encryption techniques often distort signal structure or require decryption with additional noise, compromising classification performance and real-time usability. METHODS: To address this gap, we propose a deep denoising structure-preserving neural encoding network (DSNet) that enables accurate classification of privacy-preserving encoded EEG representations without requiring decryption. EEG features were extracted using common spatial pattern (CSP) and transformed into privacy-preserving encoded representations while preserving their statistical structure. Here, encoding refers to a non-reversible neural transformation designed for privacy preservation rather than a formal cryptographic guarantee. Two deep learning architectures, a feedforward neural network (NN) and a recurrent neural network (RNN), were evaluated for classification in the encoded feature space. Furthermore, we integrated an LLM (GPT-4) to generate clinical-style summaries based on model outputs, enhancing interpretability for clinician review and potential clinical support use. RESULTS AND CONCLUSION: Using publicly available datasets, DSNet-NN achieved over 87% accuracy for every subject, outperforming both the RNN variant and baseline models. It also demonstrated resilience to simulated privacy attacks. LLM-generated reports provided clinician-friendly interpretations of MI predictions, supporting potential real-world applicability. This study introduces an AI framework that bridges privacy-preserving EEG decoding with LLM-based clinical reasoning, offering a practical solution for privacy-preserving neurorehabilitation and digital health systems.
global_hot_topics.title_en: A novel deep learning approach for privacy-preserving encoded EEG-based brain-computer interfaces with clinical LLM applications.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 一种新颖的深度学习方法，用于隐私保护编码的基于脑电图的脑机接口与临床法学硕士应用程序。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 目的：GPT-4 和 DeepSeek 等大型语言模型 (LLM) 的兴起通过实现基于自然语言的临床推理，改变了医疗保健信息处理。然而，法学硕士与隐私敏感的生物医学信号的整合，特别是脑机接口（BCI）系统中使用的脑电图（EEG）数据的整合仍有待探索。脑电图信号，尤其是在运动想象 (MI) 任务期间，对于辅助神经技术至关重要，但由于其揭示认知和医疗信息的能力，会带来重大的隐私风险。传统的加密技术通常会扭曲信号结构或需要使用额外噪声进行解密，从而损害分类性能和实时可用性。方法：为了解决这一差距，我们提出了一种深度去噪结构保留神经编码网络（DSNet），它能够对隐私保护编码脑电图表示进行准确分类，而无需解密。使用通用空间模式（CSP）提取脑电图特征，并将其转换为保护隐私的编码表示，同时保留其统计结构。这里，编码是指为隐私保护而设计的不可逆神经变换，而不是正式的密码学保证。评估了两种深度学习架构，即前馈神经网络 (NN) 和循环神经网络 (RNN)，以在编码特征空间中进行分类。此外，我们集成了法学硕士 (GPT-4)，以根据模型输出生成临床风格的摘要，从而增强临床医生审查和潜在临床支持用途的可解释性。结果和结论：使用公开可用的数据集，DSNet-NN 对每个受试者的准确率都超过 87%，优于 RNN 变体模型和基线模型。它还表现出了对模拟隐私攻击的抵御能力。法学硕士生成的报告为 MI 预测提供了临床医生友好的解释，支持潜在的现实应用性。本研究引入了一种人工智能框架，将保护隐私的脑电图解码与基于法学硕士的临床推理联系起来，为保护隐私的神经康复提供了实用的解决方案……

global_hot_topics.title: Immune regulatory mechanisms and potential microbiota-associated targets in Kawasaki disease: an integrative multi-omics and network pharmacology study.
global_hot_topics.abstract: Kawasaki disease (KD) is a systemic vasculitis in children primarily affecting the coronary arteries, and studies suggest that the gut microbiota may be involved in KD pathogenesis, inflammatory responses, and immune regulation. This study employed an integrative multi-omics strategy to systematically investigate gut microbiota-metabolite interactions in KD. Key molecular targets were identified using network-based analyses and machine learning models, with Mendelian randomization providing causal validation. Single-cell transcriptomics and molecular docking further elucidated immune cell interactions and metabolite-protein binding, highlighting critical regulatory pathways. We identified SELP as a core molecular target in KD, predominantly expressed in platelets and involved in immune and inflammatory responses. Gut microbiota-derived metabolites, including palmitoylethanolamide, pantothenic acid, and 1-O-caffeoylglycerol, may regulate immune cell interactions via the RESISTIN signalling pathway. Altered abundances of microbial taxa such as Bacteroides, Parabacteroides, and Bifidobacterium suggest their potential role in inflammation modulation. Activation of IL-17, TNF, MAPK, and PI3K-Akt pathways further contributes to disease progression, highlighting the microbiota-metabolite-SELP axis as a potential therapeutic target in KD. These findings lay the groundwork for subsequent in vitro and in vivo studies, advancing the development of microbiome-based intervention strategies.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Immune regulatory mechanisms and potential microbiota-associated targets in Kawasaki disease: an integrative multi-omics and network pharmacology study.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 川崎病的免疫调节机制和潜在的微生物相关靶标：一项综合多组学和网络药理学研究。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 川崎病 (KD) 是一种主要影响冠状动脉的儿童系统性血管炎，研究表明肠道微生物群可能参与 KD 发病机制、炎症反应和免疫调节。本研究采用综合多组学策略来系统地研究川崎病中肠道微生物群与代谢物的相互作用。使用基于网络的分析和机器学习模型确定了关键分子靶点，并通过孟德尔随机化提供因果验证。单细胞转录组学和分子对接进一步阐明了免疫细胞相互作用和代谢物-蛋白质结合，突出了关键的调控途径。我们将 SELP 确定为 KD 的核心分子靶点，主要在血小板中表达并参与免疫和炎症反应。肠道微生物群衍生的代谢物，包括棕榈酰乙醇酰胺、泛酸和 1-O-咖啡酰甘油，可能通过 RESISTIN 信号通路调节免疫细胞相互作用。拟杆菌属、副拟杆菌属和双歧杆菌等微生物类群丰度的改变表明它们在炎症调节中的潜在作用。 IL-17、TNF、MAPK 和 PI3K-Akt 通路的激活进一步促进疾病进展，凸显微生物群-代谢物-SELP 轴作为 KD 的潜在治疗靶点。这些发现为后续的体外和体内研究奠定了基础，推动了基于微生物组的干预策略的发展。

global_hot_topics.title: POU2F2 as a dual oncogenic and immunomodulatory driver in kidney renal clear cell carcinoma.
global_hot_topics.authors: Gonglin Tang; Fei Liu; Mingze Sun; Chenyue Liu; Jitao Wu; Hongwei Zhao
global_hot_topics.abstract: Kidney renal clear cell carcinoma (KIRC) features an immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment (TME). We investigated the role of transcription factor POU2F2 in KIRC oncogenesis and macrophage polarization. Single-cell and spatial transcriptomics showed that POU2F2 is upregulated in KIRC and associated with metastasis and poor prognosis. POU2F2 knockdown inhibited KIRC cell proliferation, migration, and invasion in vitro. POU2F2 expression correlated with macrophage infiltration and JAK-STAT signaling. Co-culture assays showed that POU2F2 silencing reduced macrophage recruitment and shifted M2 polarization toward an anti-tumor M1 phenotype. Overall, POU2F2 acts as an oncogenic driver and prognostic biomarker in KIRC, promoting an immunosuppressive TME and representing a potential therapeutic target.
global_hot_topics.title_en: POU2F2 as a dual oncogenic and immunomodulatory driver in kidney renal clear cell carcinoma.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: POU2F2 作为肾透明细胞癌的双重致癌和免疫调节驱动因素。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 肾透明细胞癌 (KIRC) 具有免疫抑制性肿瘤微环境 (TME)。我们研究了转录因子 POU2F2 在 KIRC 肿瘤发生和巨噬细胞极化中的作用。单细胞和空间转录组学表明 POU2F2 在 KIRC 中表达上调，并与转移和不良预后相关。 POU2F2 敲低可抑制 KIRC 细胞的体外增殖、迁移和侵袭。 POU2F2 表达与巨噬细胞浸润和 JAK-STAT 信号传导相关。共培养测定表明，POU2F2 沉默减少了巨噬细胞的招募，并将 M2 极化转向抗肿瘤 M1 表型。总体而言，POU2F2 在 KIRC 中充当致癌驱动因素和预后生物标志物，促进免疫抑制性 TME 并代表潜在的治疗靶点。

global_hot_topics.title: Multi-omics profiling identifies CDK1 as a key mediator of mitosis through the PTN pathway in bladder cancer.
global_hot_topics.authors: Li Yang; Jia-Ming Zhang; Yu-Jia Chen; Zhong-Qiong Wei; Mei Zhou; Guo-Qiang Chen; Yu-Xian He; Zhi-Guang Huang
global_hot_topics.abstract: AIMS: This study aimed to characterize cyclin-dependent kinase 1 (CDK1) expression in bladder cancer (BC), elucidate its role in intercellular signaling and mitosis, and identify small-molecule inhibitors targeting CDK1. METHODS: RNA sequencing data from multiple databases were integrated, with immunohistochemistry on tissue microarrays validating protein expression. Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq), spatial transcriptomics (ST), gene set enrichment analysis (GSEA), and molecular docking with molecular dynamics (MD) simulations were performed. RESULTS: CDK1 mRNA and protein were significantly overexpressed in BC tissues. CDK1 expression correlated with patient age and race. CDK1 was predominantly expressed in epithelial cells and central to pleiotrophin (PTN) pathway-mediated intercellular communication; virtual CDK1 knockout markedly reduced PTN signaling strength. ST confirmed CDK1 enrichment in tumor regions. GSEA linked CDK1 to mitosis and chromosome segregation, and scRNA-seq analyses revealed a PTN-CDK1-mitosis regulatory axis active specifically in epithelial cells. Dinaciclib showed favorable MD stability as a CDK1 inhibitor. CONCLUSION: CDK1 is significantly overexpressed in BC with good discriminatory ability. Predominantly expressed in BC epithelial cells, CDK1 may be activated by PTN signaling to drive mitosis. MD simulations support Dinaciclib as a promising CDK1-targeting inhibitor. Bladder cancer is one of the most common cancers of the urinary tract worldwide. Many patients face a difficult challenge: after standard treatments, tumors frequently come back, and existing targeted therapies work for only a small proportion of people. There is therefore an urgent need to better understand what drives bladder cancer growth and to find new treatment targets.This study focused on a protein called CDK1, which acts like a molecular “switch” controlling how and when cells divide. Using data from hundreds of bladder cancer tissue samples across multiple international databases, alongside laboratory staining experiments on tumor tissue, we confirmed that CDK1 levels are significantly higher in bladder cancer than in normal bladder tissue, and that CDK1 can reliably distinguish cancerous from healthy tissue.By examining individual cancer cells using advanced single-cell technologies, we found that CDK1 is concentrated mainly in the lining cells of the bladder tumor. We also identified that a signaling molecule called PTN appears to “switch on” CDK1 in these cells, which in turn drives tumor cells to divide and multiply more rapidly.Finally, using computer-based drug-screening methods, we identified Dinaciclib as a particularly promising molecule capable of blocking CDK1 activity, with stable binding behavior confirmed by computer simulations.

global_hot_topics.title: Clinical Outcomes After Failed Endoscopic Detorsion for Sigmoid Volvulus: A Single-Center Retrospective Cohort Study.
global_hot_topics.authors: Hidehiro Kamezaki; Arisa Kato; Nana Yamada; Terunao Iwanaga; Takafumi Sakuma; Koji Takahashi; Junichi Senoo; Sadahisa Ogasawara
global_hot_topics.abstract: OBJECTIVES: Endoscopic detorsion is the first-line treatment for sigmoid volvulus (SV); however, detorsion is not always successful. We evaluated clinical outcomes after failed endoscopic detorsion and assessed recurrence in patients who achieved clinical success after decompression. METHODS: This single-center retrospective cohort study included 47 patients with first-episode SV, of whom 43 underwent endoscopic management. Baseline characteristics and short-term outcomes were compared between successful and failed detorsion groups. Among patients with clinical success, the in-hospital course and 1-year cumulative recurrence were compared between the successful detorsion and successful decompression groups. Cumulative recurrence was evaluated using the Kaplan-Meier method. RESULTS: Successful detorsion was achieved in 21 of 43 patients (48.8%). Among 22 patients with failed detorsion, 17 achieved clinical success after decompression, whereas five had clinical failure, including four who underwent emergency surgery and one who died the following day. The overall clinical success rate was 88.4% (38/43). Failed detorsion was associated with lower room-air oxygen saturation and higher lactate levels. Clinical success was less frequent in the failed detorsion group (77.3% vs. 100%, p = 0.065), and hospital stay was longer (median 13 vs. 7 days, p = 0.071). Among patients with clinical success, time to resumption of oral intake was shorter in the successful detorsion group (median 1.5 vs. 3 days, p = 0.004), whereas the 1-year cumulative recurrence rate was numerically higher but not statistically significant (79.6 vs. 51.3%, log-rank p = 0.087). CONCLUSIONS: After assessing the need for emergency surgery, decompression alone may not always require immediate repeat detorsion in selected patients who improve clinically. TRIAL REGISTRATION: N/A.

global_hot_topics.title_cn: 乙状结肠扭转内镜扭转失败后的临床结果：单中心回顾性队列研究。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 目的：内镜扭转是乙状结肠扭转（SV）的一线治疗方法；然而，扭转并不总是成功。我们评估了内镜扭转失败后的临床结果，并评估了减压后临床成功的患者的复发情况。方法：这项单中心回顾性队列研究纳入了 47 例首发 SV 患者，其中 43 例接受了内镜治疗。比较成功和失败扭转组之间的基线特征和短期结果。在临床成功的患者中，比较成功扭转组和成功减压组的院内病程​​和1年累积复发情况。使用Kaplan-Meier方法评估累积复发率。结果：43 名患者中有 21 名患者成功扭转（48.8%）。 22例扭转失败的患者中，17例减压后获得临床成功，5例临床失败，其中4例接受紧急手术，1例第二天死亡。总体临床成功率为88.4%（38/43）。扭转失败与较低的室内空气氧饱和度和较高的乳酸水平有关。扭转失败组的临床成功率较低（77.3% vs. 100%，p = 0.065），住院时间较长（中位时间 13 天 vs. 7 天，p = 0.071）。在临床成功的患者中，成功扭转组恢复经口摄入的时间较短（中位 1.5 天 vs. 3 天，p = 0.004），而 1 年累积复发率在数值上较高，但不具有统计学意义（79.6% vs. 51.3%，对数秩 p = 0.087）。结论：在评估紧急手术的必要性后，对于临床改善的选定患者，单纯减压可能并不总是需要立即重复扭转。试用注册：不适用。

global_hot_topics.title: Immune evasion in locally advanced mismatch repair-deficient microsatellite instability-high colorectal cancer: Reduced T-cell infiltration and upregulation of epithelial IDO1 expression.
global_hot_topics.authors: Sabina Niyazova; Christine Sers; Hendrik Bläker; David Horst; Wolfgang Schmitt; Zehra Karadeniz; Simon Schallenberg; Alexej Ballhausen
global_hot_topics.abstract: Early-stage colorectal cancer (CRC) with confirmed microsatellite instability generally has a favorable prognosis associated with pronounced immune infiltration. However, some patients still develop metastases. The underlying mechanisms, particularly those related to the tumor immune microenvironment, remain incompletely understood. The study included tissue samples from 217 patients with dMMR/MSI-H CRC, comprising 89 stage III/IV and 128 stage I/II cases. Tissue microarrays and immunohistochemical analyzes were performed for all cases. We evaluated immune markers identifying T cells, B cells, dendritic cells, natural killer cells, macrophages, immunosuppressive markers, and immune checkpoint targets in epithelial and stromal compartments, and additionally performed a cohort-derived immune infiltration score (IIS). The survival analysis assessed the prognostic impact of immune markers stratified by tumor stage. Stage I/II dMMR/MSI-H CRCs showed significantly higher CD3⁺ T-cell and natural killer cell levels, higher IIS metrics across all regions, and higher CD4⁺ T helper cell levels in the stroma. Stage III/IV cases exhibited increased epithelial expression of indoleamine 2,3-dioxygenase 1. Given the limited number of stage IV patients, an additional stage III vs. stage I/II comparison was performed, revealing that these immune differences were already evident at the level of nodal progression. In addition, CD3⁺, CD4⁺, and CD8⁺ T cells and the IIS showed varying prognostic associations across tumor stages. These findings suggest that the overall immunogenicity and prognostic relevance of immune markers in dMMR/MSI-H CRC depend on tumor stage. Immune profiling could be used for early-stage patient stratification and also suggests the potential benefit of early immunotherapeutic intervention.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Immune evasion in locally advanced mismatch repair-deficient microsatellite instability-high colorectal cancer: Reduced T-cell infiltration and upregulation of epithelial IDO1 expression.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 局部晚期错配修复缺陷-微卫星不稳定性-高结直肠癌中的免疫逃避：T细胞浸润减少和上皮IDO1表达上调。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 已证实微卫星不稳定性的早期结直肠癌（CRC）通常具有良好的预后，且与明显的免疫浸润相关。然而，一些患者仍然出现转移。潜在的机制，特别是与肿瘤免疫微环境相关的机制，仍不完全清楚。该研究包括 217 名 dMMR/MSI-H CRC 患者的组织样本，其中包括 89 名 III/IV 期病例和 128 名 I/II 期病例。对所有病例进行组织微阵列和免疫组织化学分析。我们评估了识别上皮和基质区室中的 T 细胞、B 细胞、树突状细胞、自然杀伤细胞、巨噬细胞、免疫抑制标记物和免疫检查点目标的免疫标记物，并另外进行了队列衍生的免疫浸润评分 (IIS)。生存分析评估了按肿瘤分期分层的免疫标记物的预后影响。 I/II 期 dMMR/MSI-H CRC 显示显着更高的 CD3⁺ T 细胞和自然杀伤细胞水平、所有区域更高的 IIS 指标以及基质中更高的 CD4⁺ T 辅助细胞水平。 III/IV 期病例表现出吲哚胺 2,3-双加氧酶 1 的上皮表达增加。鉴于 IV 期患者数量有限，进行了额外的 III 期与 I/II 期比较，揭示了这些免疫差异在淋巴结进展水平上已经很明显。此外，CD3⁺、CD4⁺和CD8⁺ T细胞和IIS在不同肿瘤阶段表现出不同的预后关联。这些发现表明，dMMR/MSI-H CRC 中免疫标记物的总体免疫原性和预后相关性取决于肿瘤分期。免疫分析可用于早期患者分层，也表明早期免疫治疗干预的潜在益处。

global_hot_topics.title: Human gut flagellome profiling using FlaPro reveals TLR5-related phenotype-specific alterations in IBD.
global_hot_topics.authors: Anna A Bogdanova; Andrea Borbón-García; Ruth E Ley; Alexander V Tyakht
global_hot_topics.abstract: Flagellin, the structural protein of bacterial flagella, activates the innate immune receptor Toll-like receptor 5 (TLR5). However, the ability of different flagellins to bind and stimulate TLR5 varies widely, suggesting that the composition of an individual's flagellin repertoire, defined as flagellome, may influence host-microbiome interactions and inflammation. Here, we developed FlaPro, a computational pipeline for quantification and functional annotation of human gut flagellomes. Functional categories in FlaPro are derived from a machine learning model trained on experimentally characterized flagellins with defined TLR5-binding and stimulatory activities. Application of FlaPro to a multi-omics inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) cohort revealed a marked depletion of flagellome diversity and a reduced ratio of silent to stimulatory flagellins in Crohn's disease and ulcerative colitis. These alterations were consistent across genomic and transcriptional layers, indicating a disease-associated shift toward more stimulatory flagellome profiles. Our findings suggest that specific features of the gut flagellome contribute to TLR5-mediated immune activation and may serve as functionally interpretable microbiome markers for future microbiome-wide association studies in health and disease. The workflow implemented in Snakemake is openly available at https://github.com/leylabmpi/FlaPro.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Human gut flagellome profiling using FlaPro reveals TLR5-related phenotype-specific alterations in IBD.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 使用 FlaPro 进行的人类肠道鞭毛组分析揭示了 IBD 中与 TLR5 相关的表型特异性改变。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 鞭毛蛋白是细菌鞭毛的结构蛋白，可激活先天免疫受体 Toll 样受体 5 (TLR5)。然而，不同鞭毛蛋白结合和刺激 TLR5 的能力差异很大，这表明个体鞭毛蛋白库（定义为鞭毛体）的组成可能会影响宿主-微生物组相互作用和炎症。在这里，我们开发了 FlaPro，一种用于人类肠道鞭毛定量和功能注释的计算管道。 FlaPro 中的功能类别源自机器学习模型，该模型在具有定义的 TLR5 结合和刺激活性的实验表征鞭毛蛋白上进行训练。 FlaPro 在多组学炎症性肠病 (IBD) 队列中的应用显示，克罗恩病和溃疡性结肠炎中鞭毛体多样性显着减少，沉默鞭毛蛋白与刺激性鞭毛蛋白的比例降低。这些改变在基因组和转录层中是一致的，表明与疾病相关的鞭毛组谱向更具刺激性的转变。我们的研究结果表明，肠道鞭毛体的特定特征有助于 TLR5 介导的免疫激活，并且可以作为未来健康和疾病微生物组范围关联研究的功能可解释的微生物组标记。 Snakemake 中实现的工作流程可在 https://github.com/leylabmpi/FlaPro 上公开获取。

medical_news.title: New vitamin B12 therapy shows promise against deadly brain cancer
medical_news.abstract: Researchers have identified a vitamin B12–based compound that can cross the blood-brain barrier and home in on glioblastoma tumors. In animal studies, the compound accumulated preferentially in tumor tissue and delivered sustained nitric oxide directly to cancer cells. It also worked synergistically with existing glioblastoma treatments, significantly enhancing their tumor-fighting effects.
medical_news.title_en: New vitamin B12 therapy shows promise against deadly brain cancer

medical_news.abstract_cn: 研究人员发现了一种基于维生素 B12 的化合物，可以穿过血脑屏障并瞄准胶质母细胞瘤。在动物研究中，该化合物优先在肿瘤组织中积累，并将持续的一氧化氮直接输送到癌细胞。它还与现有的胶质母细胞瘤治疗协同作用，显着增强其抗肿瘤效果。

medical_news.title: Scientists say creatine may help fight depression
medical_news.abstract: Creatine is best known as a muscle-building supplement, but scientists are now investigating whether it could also help treat depression by boosting the brain's energy supply. A new review examined five randomized clinical trials involving 238 participants and found mixed results. Two studies, both involving women with major depressive disorder, reported that adding creatine to standard treatment improved symptoms, while three others found no meaningful benefit.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists say creatine may help fight depression
medical_news.title_cn: 科学家称肌酸可能有助于对抗抑郁症
medical_news.abstract_cn: 肌酸最著名的是一种肌肉增强补充剂，但科学家们现在正在研究它是否也可以通过增加大脑的能量供应来帮助治疗抑郁症。一项新的综述审查了 5 项涉及 238 名参与者的随机临床试验，发现结果好坏参半。两项研究均涉及患有重度抑郁症的女性，报告称在标准治疗中添加肌酸可以改善症状，而其他三项研究则没有发现任何有意义的益处。

medical_news.title: New weight loss pill beats oral Ozempic in major trial
medical_news.abstract: A new once-daily weight-loss pill called orforglipron delivered better weight loss and blood sugar improvements for people with type 2 diabetes than the leading oral semaglutide in a major clinical trial. The tablet could offer a more convenient alternative to injectable drugs like Ozempic and Wegovy because it doesn't require refrigeration or special timing with meals. It's also cheaper to manufacture, which could expand access globally.
medical_news.title_en: New weight loss pill beats oral Ozempic in major trial
medical_news.title_cn: 新型减肥药在重大试验中胜过口服 Ozempic

medical_news.title: NFL Players Face Fourfold Increase in Neurodegenerative Mortality
medical_news.abstract: A retrospective cohort study of 19,824 NFL players confirms that professional football veterans face a fourfold increase in neurodegenerative mortality, including a 3.8-fold surge in all-cause dementia and Parkinson's disease.
medical_news.title_en: NFL Players Face Fourfold Increase in Neurodegenerative Mortality

medical_news.abstract_cn: 一项针对 19,824 名 NFL 球员的回顾性队列研究证实，职业橄榄球退伍军人的神经退行性死亡率增加了四倍，其中全因痴呆和帕金森病的死亡率增加了 3.8 倍。

medical_news.title: Tiny silica particles wiped out aggressive prostate cancer in mice
medical_news.abstract: Tiny silica nanoparticles engineered to seek out prostate cancer caused tumor cells to self-destruct and supercharged the immune system in preclinical mouse studies. Combined with immunotherapy, the treatment produced complete remissions in multiple mice, raising hopes for a powerful new approach to prostate cancer.
medical_news.title_en: Tiny silica particles wiped out aggressive prostate cancer in mice

medical_news.title: Scientists finally crack nature's secret for building better cancer drugs
medical_news.abstract: Researchers have cracked the code behind bacteria's ability to naturally manufacture multiple versions of powerful anti-cancer drugs. The discovery could make it much easier to engineer new cancer treatments inspired by nature, including improved versions of existing medicines.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists finally crack nature's secret for building better cancer drugs

medical_news.abstract_cn: 研究人员破解了细菌自然制造多种强效抗癌药物的能力背后的密码。这一发现可以使受大自然启发设计新的癌症治疗方法变得更加容易，包括现有药物的改进版本。

medical_news.title: Creatine doesn't just build muscle. It may also help fight cancer
medical_news.abstract: Scientists have discovered that creatine may strengthen one of the immune system's most important cancer-fighting pathways by energizing dendritic cells that activate killer T cells. The promising results could eventually help make immunotherapy more effective, but they have not yet been tested in human patients.
medical_news.title_en: Creatine doesn't just build muscle. It may also help fight cancer
medical_news.title_cn: 肌酸不仅仅可以增强肌肉。它还可能有助于对抗癌症
medical_news.abstract_cn: 科学家发现，肌酸可以通过激活树突状细胞来增强免疫系统最重要的抗癌途径之一，从而激活杀伤性 T 细胞。这些有希望的结果最终可能有助于使免疫疗法更加有效，但尚未在人类患者中进行测试。

medical_news.title: This common vitamin deficiency can mimic normal aging
medical_news.abstract: Vitamin B12 is needed in microscopic amounts, but a shortage can have major effects on health and energy. The vitamin was first linked to a lifesaving liver treatment for pernicious anemia nearly 100 years ago. Today, researchers are finding that B12 may also help keep cellular powerhouses called mitochondria functioning properly. This could explain why some people experience fatigue and brain fog even before traditional signs of deficiency show up.
medical_news.title_en: This common vitamin deficiency can mimic normal aging
medical_news.title_cn: 这种常见的维生素缺乏症可以模拟正常的衰老过程
medical_news.abstract_cn: 维生素 B12 的需求量极小，但缺乏会对健康和能量产生重大影响。大约 100 年前，这种维生素首次被用于治疗恶性贫血的挽救生命的肝脏治疗方法。如今，研究人员发现 B12 还可能有助于保持称为线粒体的细胞发电站正常运转。这可以解释为什么有些人甚至在传统的缺乏迹象出现之前就感到疲劳和脑雾。
